        "Module scripts have .lua extension",

--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedFirst/Aero/AeroLoad.client.lua ---

--[[
    AeroLoad (LocalScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → Aero
    Parent: Aero
    Properties:
        Disabled: false
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57
]]
if tostring({}):match("0x00000000") ~= nil then
	game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:Kick("You're using an old version of Roblox which isn't supported in this game. You might also be using a discontinued release, platform or edition.")
end

--[[

	At its heart, the way to wait for the AeroGameFramework to
	load is to simply wait for it to exist in the _G table:

		while (not _G.Aero) do wait() end
		local aero = _G.Aero


	The following code shows how to do this with a custom GUI,
	but you will have to fill in some of the code yourself.

	IF YOU USE THIS CODE, MAKE SURE TO PUT IT IN A FILE NAMED
	SOMETHING OTHER THAN 'AeroLoad' SO FUTURE FRAMEWORK UPDATES
	DO NOT OVERWRITE YOUR CUSTOM 'AeroLoad' SCRIPT. YOU CAN NAME
	IT ANYTHING, LIKE 'MyCustomAeroLoad'

]]

--[[  UNCOMMENT TO USE THIS TEMPLATE (BUT BE SURE TO ADD YOUR OWN GUI ON LINE 47)

local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer

-- Temporary blackout used until the Aero Fade module is loaded:
local tempBlackout = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
tempBlackout.Name = "TemporaryBlackout"
tempBlackout.DisplayOrder = 10
do
	local frame = Instance.new("Frame")
	frame.Name = "Overlay"
	frame.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	frame.Size = UDim2.new(2, 0, 2, 0)
	frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
	frame.Parent = tempBlackout
end

-- Remove default loading screen & replace with a temporary black overlay:
tempBlackout.Parent = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
game:GetService("ReplicatedFirst"):RemoveDefaultLoadingScreen()

-- Wait for the Aero client to load:
while (not _G.Aero) do wait() end
local aero = _G.Aero

-- Make screen black using the Aero Fade module:
aero.Controllers.Fade:Out(0)

-- Remove the temporary overlay, since we don't need it anymore:
tempBlackout:Destroy()

-- Add in your own loading screen GUI:
local loadingGui = script.YOUR_CUSTOM_GUI
loadingGui.Parent = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

-- Fade in slowly to show your loading screen:
aero.Controllers.Fade:In(1)

-- Wait for the game to load if not loaded yet:
if (not game:IsLoaded()) then
	game.Loaded:Wait()
end

-- INSERT OTHER LOADING THINGS HERE
-- EXAMPLE: game:GetService("ContentProvider"):PreloadAsync({foo, bar, etc})

-- Fade out to black, remove your GUI, and then fade back in:
wait(3)
aero.Controllers.Fade:Out(1)
loadingGui:Destroy()
aero.Controllers.Fade:In(1)

]]



================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedFirst/vClient/Loading/LoadingController.client.lua ---

--[[
    LoadingController (LocalScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → vClient → Loading
    Parent: Loading
    Properties:
        Disabled: false
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57
]]
local ContentProvider = game:GetService('ContentProvider');
local ReplicatedFirst = game:GetService('ReplicatedFirst');
local Players = game:GetService('Players')
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer;

local loadingScreenGui = ReplicatedFirst:WaitForChild('LoadingGUI') :: ScreenGui;
loadingScreenGui.Parent = localPlayer:WaitForChild('PlayerGui');

local LoadingGUI = require(script.Parent.LoadingGUI);
local LoadingModel = require(script.Parent.LoadingModel);

ReplicatedFirst:RemoveDefaultLoadingScreen();
LoadingGUI.Enable();

LoadingGUI.SetStatusText("Initialising Framework...");
while (not _G.Aero) do task.wait() end

LoadingGUI.SetStatusText("Loading Data...");
if not localPlayer:GetAttribute("DataLoaded") then
    localPlayer:GetAttributeChangedSignal("DataLoaded"):Wait()
end;

if not RunService:IsStudio() then
    LoadingGUI.SetStatusText("Loading Assets...");
    ContentProvider:PreloadAsync(LoadingModel.GetPreloadAssets());
end

LoadingGUI.SetStatusText("Loading Map...");
if not game:IsLoaded() then
    game.Loaded:Wait();
end;

task.wait(2.5);

LoadingGUI.Disable();



================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedFirst/vClient/Loading/LoadingGUI.lua ---

--[[
    LoadingGUI (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → vClient → Loading
    Parent: Loading
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57
]]
local TweenService = game:GetService('TweenService');
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
game:GetService('StarterGui'):SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.PlayerList, false);

local LineAnimation = require(script:WaitForChild('LineAnimation'));

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local loadingGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('LoadingGUI');
local mainFrame = loadingGUI.MainFrame;
local backgroundFrame = loadingGUI.BackgroundFrame;

local LoadingGUI = {};

local sound;

local thread;

function LoadingGUI.Enable()
    sound = Instance.new('Sound');
    sound.Parent = loadingGUI;
    sound.SoundId = 'rbxassetid://1848189430'; -- 1848189430
    sound.Volume = 0.01;
    if localPlayer.UserId ~= 47890485 then sound:Play() end; -- :^)
    sound.Looped = true;
    loadingGUI.Enabled = true;

    local soundTween = TweenService:Create(sound, TweenInfo.new(2), {Volume = 0.8});
    task.defer(soundTween.Play, soundTween);

    LineAnimation.Begin();

    thread = task.defer(function()
        local attrs = game:GetService("ReplicatedFirst"):WaitForChild("game_attributes")
        local placeVersion = attrs:GetAttribute("placeVersion")
        local debugLabel = `v2.{placeVersion}`
        if RunService:IsStudio() then
            debugLabel = `Development {placeVersion}`
        elseif game.PlaceId ~= 7197780083 then
            debugLabel = `Staging {placeVersion}`
        end
        if attrs:GetAttribute("isAlternateServer") then
            debugLabel ..= `\nAlternate server`
        elseif attrs:GetAttribute("isTestServer") then
            debugLabel ..= `\nTemporary server`
        elseif attrs:GetAttribute("isVipServer") then
            debugLabel ..= `\nPrivate server`
        end
        loadingGUI.LocationLabel.Text = debugLabel

        repeat task.wait() until (workspace:GetAttribute('LocationCode') and workspace:GetAttribute('LocationCity')) or loadingGUI.Enabled ~= true

        local locationCode = workspace:GetAttribute('LocationCode');
        local locationCity = workspace:GetAttribute('LocationCity');

        loadingGUI.LocationLabel.Text = `{debugLabel}\n{locationCode} ({locationCity})`
    end);
end;

function LoadingGUI.SetStatusText(text: string)
    mainFrame.StatusLabel.Text = text;
end

_G.LoadingError = function(moduleName)
    if localPlayer:GetAttribute('Developer') == true then
        mainFrame.StatusLabel.Text = `{moduleName} failed to load.`;
    else
        mainFrame.StatusLabel.Text = 'An error occurred while loading. Contact a developer';
    end
    mainFrame.StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0);
    mainFrame.TopFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0);
    mainFrame.RightFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0);
    mainFrame.BottomFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0);
    mainFrame.LeftFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0);
end

function LoadingGUI.Disable()
    local soundTween = TweenService:Create(sound, TweenInfo.new(2), {Volume = 0})
    soundTween:Play();
    soundTween.Completed:Connect(function()
        sound:Destroy();
    end);

    local invisibleTween = TweenService:Create(backgroundFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.6), {BackgroundTransparency = 1, Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)});
    invisibleTween:Play();
    invisibleTween.Completed:Wait();
    local moveTween = TweenService:Create(mainFrame, TweenInfo.new(1), {Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, -1.3)});
    moveTween:Play();
    moveTween.Completed:Wait();
    LineAnimation.Stop();
    loadingGUI.Enabled = false;
    loadingGUI:Destroy();

    task.cancel(thread);
end

return LoadingGUI;



================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedFirst/vClient/Loading/LoadingGUI_contents/LineAnimation.lua ---

--[[
    LineAnimation (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → vClient → Loading → LoadingGUI
    Parent: LoadingGUI
    ⚠️  NESTED SCRIPT: This script is inside another script
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57
]]
local SPEED = 300;
local LINE_LENGTH = 80;

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local loadingGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('LoadingGUI');
local mainFrame = loadingGUI.MainFrame;
local topFrame = mainFrame.TopFrame;
local rightFrame = mainFrame.RightFrame;
local bottomFrame = mainFrame.BottomFrame;
local leftFrame = mainFrame.LeftFrame;

local mainFrameSize = mainFrame.AbsoluteSize;

local END_POSITION_X = mainFrameSize.X + LINE_LENGTH;
local END_POSITION_Y = mainFrameSize.Y + LINE_LENGTH;

local frames = { -- frame, defaultPosition, startsOnOppositeSide, isVertical
	{topFrame, topFrame.Position},
	{rightFrame, rightFrame.Position, false, true},
	{bottomFrame, bottomFrame.Position, true},
	{leftFrame, leftFrame.Position, true, true}
};

for i, v in next, frames do
    local isVertical = v[4];
    v[1].Size = UDim2.fromOffset(isVertical and 5 or LINE_LENGTH, isVertical and LINE_LENGTH or 5);
end;

local index = 1;
local currentFrame = frames[index];
local position = 0;
local nextPosition = 0;

local animationConnection;

local LineAnimation = {};

function LineAnimation.Begin()
    animationConnection = game:GetService('RunService').Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
        local frame = currentFrame[1];
        local defaultPosition = currentFrame[2];
        local startsOnOppositeSide = currentFrame[3];
        local isVertical = currentFrame[4];

        position = position + SPEED * dt;

        if position > (isVertical and END_POSITION_Y or END_POSITION_X) then -- Check if current frame has completed path.
            index = (index % #frames) + 1;
            currentFrame = frames[index];
            position = nextPosition;
            frame.Position = defaultPosition;
            return;
        end;

        if position > (isVertical and mainFrameSize.Y or mainFrameSize.X) then -- Update next frame.
            local nextCurrentFrame = frames[(index % #frames) + 1];
            local nextFrame = nextCurrentFrame[1];
            local nextDefaultPosition = nextCurrentFrame[2];
            local nextStartsOnOppositeSide = nextCurrentFrame[3];
            local nextIsVertical = nextCurrentFrame[4];

            if isVertical then
                if startsOnOppositeSide then
                    nextPosition = mainFrame.AbsolutePosition.Y - frame.AbsolutePosition.Y;
                else
                    nextPosition = (frame.AbsolutePosition.Y + LINE_LENGTH) - (mainFrame.AbsolutePosition.Y + mainFrameSize.Y);
                end;
            else
                if startsOnOppositeSide then
                    nextPosition = mainFrame.AbsolutePosition.X - frame.AbsolutePosition.X;
                else
                    nextPosition = (frame.AbsolutePosition.X + LINE_LENGTH) - (mainFrame.AbsolutePosition.X + mainFrameSize.X);
                end;
            end;

            nextFrame.Position = UDim2.new(
                nextDefaultPosition.X.Scale,
                nextIsVertical and nextDefaultPosition.X.Offset or (nextStartsOnOppositeSide and -nextPosition or nextPosition),
                nextDefaultPosition.Y.Scale,
                nextIsVertical and (nextStartsOnOppositeSide and -nextPosition or nextPosition) or nextDefaultPosition.Y.Offset
            );
        end;

        frame.Position = UDim2.new(
            defaultPosition.X.Scale,
            isVertical and defaultPosition.X.Offset or (startsOnOppositeSide and -position or position),
            defaultPosition.Y.Scale,
            isVertical and (startsOnOppositeSide and -position or position) or defaultPosition.Y.Offset
        );
    end);
end;

function LineAnimation.Stop()
    if not animationConnection then return; end;
    animationConnection:Disconnect();
    animationConnection = nil;

    for i, v in next, frames do
        local defaultPosition = v[2];
        v[1].Position = defaultPosition;
    end;
end;

function LineAnimation:Start()

end;

function LineAnimation:Init()

end;

return LineAnimation;

--[[
    LoadingModel (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → vClient → Loading

    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57

local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;

local preloadAssets = {
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5764609631', -- Crosshair.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5764742471', -- Hitmarker.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=6173456883', -- Minimap.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=4530318781', -- UI rounded rectangle image.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=8592457358', -- Bottom Left Corner Button.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=8592396293', -- Bottom Left Corner Button.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=8592355343', -- Bottom Left Corner Button.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=7084713379', -- Bottom Left Corner Button.
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5490787804', --speedometer
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498378510', --flip button
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498111243', --arrow
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5898761450', --hazards
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498251451', --headlights
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498600890', --horn
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498110665', --left arrow
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498238359', --lock
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498271019', --park
    'rbxassetid://8925967909', --car radio
    'http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=5498111243', --right arrow
    localPlayer.PlayerGui
};

local LoadingModel = {};

function LoadingModel.GetPreloadAssets()
    return preloadAssets;
end;

function LoadingModel:Start()

end;

function LoadingModel:Init()

end;

return LoadingModel;


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedFirst/vClient/LoadUI.client.lua ---

--[[
    LoadUI (LocalScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → vClient
    Parent: vClient
    Properties:
        Disabled: false
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57
]]
if (not game:IsLoaded()) then
	game.Loaded:Wait();
end;

local UI = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').UI;
local player = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local playerGui = player.PlayerGui;
local deleteScript = true;

-- Should be used for temporary development purposes
local EXCLUSIONS = { --[["PhoneGUI"]] }

for i, v in next, UI:GetChildren() do
	if v:IsA('PackageLink') then continue; end;
	if table.find(EXCLUSIONS, v.Name) then continue end;
	
	if v:IsA('LayerCollector') and v.ResetOnSpawn then
		deleteScript = false;
		local currentGui;
		player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
			if (currentGui) then
				currentGui:Destroy();
			end;
			currentGui = v:Clone();
			currentGui.Parent = playerGui;
		end);
	else
		v.Parent = playerGui;
	end;
end;

if deleteScript then
	script:Destroy();
end;


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedFirst/vClient/UIScale.client.lua ---

--[[
    UIScale (LocalScript)
    Path: ReplicatedFirst → vClient
    Parent: vClient
    Properties:
        Disabled: false
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:57
]]
local localPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;
local playerGUI = localPlayer.PlayerGui;

local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera;

local UIScales = {};

local function getScale(UIScale)
	local viewportSizeX = camera.ViewportSize.X;
	local scale;

	if viewportSizeX < 350 then
	    scale = 0.1;
	elseif viewportSizeX < 450 then
	    scale = 0.2;
	elseif viewportSizeX < 550 then
	    scale = 0.3;
	elseif viewportSizeX < 650 then
	    scale = 0.4;
	elseif viewportSizeX < 750 then
	  	scale = 0.5;
	elseif viewportSizeX < 850 then
	    scale = 0.6;
	elseif viewportSizeX < 950 then
	    scale = 0.7
	elseif viewportSizeX < 1050 then
	    scale = 0.8
	else
	    scale = 1;
	end;

	local scaleBoostValue = UIScale:FindFirstChild('Scale');
	if scaleBoostValue then
		scale = scale + scaleBoostValue.Value;
	end;

	return scale;
end;

local function updateScale()
	for i, v in next, UIScales do
		v.Scale = getScale(v);
	end;
end;

if not game:IsLoaded() then
    game.Loaded:Wait();
end;

for i, v in next, playerGUI:GetChildren() do
    local UIScale = v:FindFirstChildOfClass('UIScale');
    if UIScale then
        UIScales[#UIScales + 1] = UIScale;
        UIScale.Scale = getScale(UIScale);
    end;
end;

playerGUI.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
    local UIScale = child:FindFirstChildOfClass('UIScale');
    if UIScale then
        UIScales[#UIScales + 1] = UIScale;
        UIScale.Scale = getScale(UIScale);
    end;
end);

updateScale();
camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal('ViewportSize'):Connect(updateScale);


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Internal/Settings.lua ---

--[[
    Settings (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Internal
    Parent: Internal
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
-- Settings
-- Stephen Leitnick
-- August 25, 2020

--[[

	Settings.InternalSettings {
		DefaultOrder: number
	}

	Settings:Get(moduleScript) -> table
	Settings:GetDefault() -> table
	Settings:IsSettingsModule(moduleScript) -> boolean

--]]



local Settings = {}

Settings.InternalSettings = {
	DefaultOrder = 1000;
}

local SUFFIX = ".settings"
local DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
	Order = Settings.InternalSettings.DefaultOrder;
	PreventInit = false;
	PreventStart = false;
	Standalone = false;
}

local cache = {}


function Settings:GetDefault()
	-- Make a copy of the default settings table:
	local s = {}
	for k,v in pairs(DEFAULT_SETTINGS) do
		s[k] = v
	end
	return s
end


function Settings:Get(moduleScript, shouldCache)

	local settingsName = (moduleScript.Name .. SUFFIX)
	local settingsTbl = cache[settingsName]

	-- Return from cache if found:
	if (settingsTbl) then
		return settingsTbl
	end

	-- Find the actual settings module:
	local settingsModule = moduleScript.Parent:FindFirstChild(settingsName)

	-- Load settings module if available, or else load default settings:
	if (settingsModule) then
		settingsTbl = require(settingsModule)
		assert(type(settingsTbl) == "table", "Settings module should return a table")
	else
		settingsTbl = self:GetDefault()
	end

	-- Cache if requested:
	if (shouldCache) then
		cache[settingsName] = settingsTbl
	end

	return settingsTbl

end


function Settings:IsSettingsModule(moduleScript)
	return (moduleScript:IsA("ModuleScript") and moduleScript.Name:match(SUFFIX .. "$") ~= nil)
end


return Settings


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/AttachmentUtil.lua ---

--[[
    AttachmentUtil (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local AttachmentUtil = {};

function AttachmentUtil.GetAttachmentWorldCFrame(attachment: Attachment): CFrame
	return attachment.Parent.CFrame:toWorldSpace(attachment.CFrame)
end;

function AttachmentUtil.GetAttachmentWorldPosition(attachment: Attachment): Vector3
	return AttachmentUtil.GetAttachmentWorldCFrame(attachment).Position
end;

return AttachmentUtil;


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/Authorisation.lua ---

--[[
    Authorisation (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local DeveloperCheck = require(script.Parent.DeveloperCheck)

return function(plr: Player, mod): (boolean, boolean)
  if mod.WhitelistedTeams then
    if mod.WhitelistedTeams[plr.Team.Name] or mod.WhitelistedTeams[plr:GetAttribute('Division') or 'h'] then
      return true, true
    end
  end

  if mod.GroupID then
    if DeveloperCheck(plr) then return true, false end
    return plr:GetRankInGroup(mod.GroupID) >= (mod.MinimumRank or 1), false
  end

  if mod.Condition then
    local auth, doCache = mod.Condition(plr)
    return if auth then true else false, if doCache then true else false
  end

  return false, false
end



================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/Base64.lua ---

--[[
    Base64 (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
--- Base64
-- Encodes and decodes values to and from Base64
-- @author antifragileer <https://www.roblox.com/users/443282130/profile>
-- @see Developed for the Aero Game Framework <https://github.com/Sleitnick/AeroGameFramework>
-- @see Adapted from https://github.com/toastdriven/lua-base64 for the Roblox game.
-- @see Re-adapted from https://gist.github.com/howmanysmall/016a35f0debcfb81f14e6bee03d450de and https://gist.github.com/Reselim/40d62b17d138cc74335a1b0709e19ce2.
-- @license BSD
-- July 15, 2018

--[[

	local base64 = Base64.new()

	Example:

	local myEncodedWord = base64:Encode("Hello")

	print(myEncodedWord)

	-- outputs: SGVsbG8=

	print(base64:Decode(myEncodedWord))

	-- outputs: Hello

--]]

local Alphabet = {}
local Indexes = {}

-- A-Z
for Index = 65, 90 do
	table.insert(Alphabet, Index)
end

-- a-z
for Index = 97, 122 do
	table.insert(Alphabet, Index)
end

-- 0-9
for Index = 48, 57 do
	table.insert(Alphabet, Index)
end

table.insert(Alphabet, 43) -- +
table.insert(Alphabet, 47) -- /

for Index, Character in ipairs(Alphabet) do
	Indexes[Character] = Index
end

local Base64 = {
	ClassName = "Base64";
	__tostring = function(self)
		return self.ClassName
	end;
}

Base64.__index = Base64

local bit32_rshift = bit32.rshift
local bit32_lshift = bit32.lshift
local bit32_band = bit32.band

function Base64.new()
	return setmetatable({}, Base64)
end

--[[**
	Encodes a string in Base64.
	@param [string] Input The input string to encode.
	@returns [string] The string encoded in Base64.
**--]]
function Base64:Encode(Input)
	local InputLength = #Input
	local Output = table.create(4 * math.floor((InputLength - 1) / 3) + 4) -- Credit to AstroCode for finding the formula.
	local Length = 0

	for Index = 1, InputLength, 3 do
		local C1, C2, C3 = string.byte(Input, Index, Index + 2)

		local A = bit32_rshift(C1, 2)
		local B = bit32_lshift(bit32_band(C1, 3), 4) + bit32_rshift(C2 or 0, 4)
		local C = bit32_lshift(bit32_band(C2 or 0, 15), 2) + bit32_rshift(C3 or 0, 6)
		local D = bit32_band(C3 or 0, 63)

		Output[Length + 1] = Alphabet[A + 1]
		Output[Length + 2] = Alphabet[B + 1]
		Output[Length + 3] = C2 and Alphabet[C + 1] or 61
		Output[Length + 4] = C3 and Alphabet[D + 1] or 61
		Length += 4
	end

	local NewOutput = {}
	local NewLength = 0

	for Index = 1, Length, 4096 do
		NewLength += 1
		NewOutput[NewLength] = string.char(table.unpack(Output, Index, math.min(Index + 4096 - 1, Length)))
	end

	return table.concat(NewOutput)
end

--[[**
	Decodes a string from Base64.
	@param [string] Input The input string to decode.
	@returns [string] The newly decoded string.
**--]]
function Base64:Decode(Input)
	local Output = {}
	local Length = 0

	for Index = 1, #Input, 4 do
		local C1, C2, C3, C4 = string.byte(Input, Index, Index + 3)

		local I1 = Indexes[C1] - 1
		local I2 = Indexes[C2] - 1
		local I3 = (Indexes[C3] or 1) - 1
		local I4 = (Indexes[C4] or 1) - 1

		local A = bit32_lshift(I1, 2) + bit32_rshift(I2, 4)
		local B = bit32_lshift(bit32_band(I2, 15), 4) + bit32_rshift(I3, 2)
		local C = bit32_lshift(bit32_band(I3, 3), 6) + I4

		Length += 1
		Output[Length] = A
		if C3 ~= 61 then
			Length += 1
			Output[Length] = B
		end

		if C4 ~= 61 then
			Length += 1
			Output[Length] = C
		end
	end

	local NewOutput = {}
	local NewLength = 0

	for Index = 1, Length, 4096 do
		NewLength += 1
		NewOutput[NewLength] = string.char(table.unpack(Output, Index, math.min(Index + 4096 - 1, Length)))
	end

	return table.concat(NewOutput)
end

return Base64

================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/ClassInit.lua ---

--[[
    ClassInit (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
--Only part of vancouver not my code, link to original = https://devforum.roblox.com/t/oop-wrappercreate-classes-and-inheritance-a-bit-more-easily/648772

return function()
	local class = {}
	class.__index = class
	local new = function(...)
		local self
		if class.super then
			self = setmetatable(class.super.new(...),class)
		else
			self = setmetatable({},class)
		end
		if class.Constructor then
			class.Constructor(self,...)
		end
		return self	
	end
		
	local extends = function(self,superclass)
		setmetatable(self,{__index=superclass})
		self.super = superclass
	end
	
	local superupdate = function(self,...)
		if self.super then
			if self.super.Update then
				self.super.Update(self,...)
			else
				warn("No update method for super class!")
			end
		else
			warn("Can't super update, no super class!")
		end
	end
	
	local superdispose = function(self,...)
		if self.super then
			if self.super.Dispose then
				self.super.Dispose(self,...)
			else
				warn("No dispose method for super class!")
			end
		else
			warn("Can't super dispose, no super class!")
		end
	end
	
	class.new = new
	class.Extends = extends
	class.extends = extends
	class.superupdate = superupdate
	class.SuperUpdate = superupdate
	class.superdispose = superdispose
	class.SuperDispose = superdispose
	
	return class
end

--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/Constants/Shops.lua ---

--[[
    Shops (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared → Constants
    Parent: Constants
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local function RequirePAL(player: Player & { Character: Model })
  if not player.Backpack:FindFirstChild("PAL")
    or player.Backpack:FindFirstChild("PS | PAL")
    or player.Character:FindFirstChild("PAL")
    or player.Character:FindFirstChild("PS | PAL") then
      _G.Aero.Controllers.UI.Notification.new(
        "Purchase Refused",
        `You must have a PAL to buy from an authorized dealer.`,
        nil,
        'Red'
      )
      return false
    end
    return true
end

return {
  illegal_dealer = {
    { ToolName = 'AK-47', Price = 7500, RefillPrice = 350 },
    { ToolName = 'Airsoft Pistol', Price = 300, RefillPrice = 0 },
    { ToolName = 'Baseball Bat', Price = 700 },
    { ToolName = 'C8', Price = 5000, RefillPrice = 350 },
    { ToolName = 'AK-47', Price = 7500, RefillPrice = 350 },
    { ToolName = 'Hunting Rifle', Price = 5500, RefillPrice = 200 },
    { ToolName = 'Knife', Price = 500 },
    { ToolName = 'P226', Price = 2500, RefillPrice = 200 },
    { ToolName = 'Revolver', Price = 800, RefillPrice = 250 },
    { ToolName = 'Sawed Off Shotgun', Price = 8000, RefillPrice = 350 },
    { ToolName = 'Sniper Rifle', Price = 52_000, RefillPrice = 750 },
    { ToolName = 'UZI', Price = 4750, RefillPrice = 350 },
  },
  gun_store = {
    { ToolName = 'Hunting Rifle', Price = 5500, RefillPrice = 200, Condition = RequirePAL },
    { ToolName = 'Knife', Price = 500 },
    { ToolName = 'P226', Price = 2500, RefillPrice = 200, Condition = RequirePAL },
    { ToolName = 'PAL', Price = 1200 },
    { ToolName = 'Revolver', Price = 800, RefillPrice = 250, Condition = RequirePAL },
  },
  prison_dealer = {
    { Name = 'Example', Price = 200, Transaction = function() print(1) end }
  }
}

================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/Constants/WhitelistedTeams.lua ---

--[[
    WhitelistedTeams (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared → Constants
    Parent: Constants
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
-- Whitelisted Teams
-- Khizzer
-- July 12, 2021

local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local WhitelistedTeams = {};

function WhitelistedTeams.GetLEOTeams()
    return {
		['Vancouver Police Department'] = true,
		['British Columbia Sheriff Service'] = true,
		['Royal Canadian Mounted Police'] = true,
		['Parks Canada'] = true,
		['Correctional Service Canada'] = true,
		['Provincial Court'] = true,
		['Canadian Armed Forces'] = true,
	}
end;

function WhitelistedTeams.CheckLEO(player: Player)
	local policeTeams = WhitelistedTeams.GetLEOTeams();
	return policeTeams[player.Team.Name] ~= nil;
end;

function WhitelistedTeams.CountLEOs()
	local teams = {
		['Vancouver Police Department'] = true,
		['British Columbia Sheriff Service'] = true,
		['Royal Canadian Mounted Police'] = true,
		['Parks Canada'] = true,
	}
	local count = 0
	for _, player in Players:GetPlayers() do
		if teams[player.Team.Name] then
			count += 1
		end
	end
	return count
end

function WhitelistedTeams.GetEmergencyTeams()
	return {
		['Vancouver Police Department'] = true,
		['British Columbia Sheriff Service'] = true,
		['Vancouver Fire & Rescue Service'] = true,
		['Royal Canadian Mounted Police'] = true,
		['British Columbia Automobile Association'] = true,
		['Parks Canada'] = true,
		['Correctional Service Canada'] = true,
		['British Columbia Ambulance Service'] = true,
		['Canadian Armed Forces'] = true,
		['Translink'] = true,
		['Vancouver Coastal Health'] = true,
	}
end;

function WhitelistedTeams.CheckEmergencyServices(player: Player)
	local emergencyTeams = WhitelistedTeams.GetEmergencyTeams();
	return emergencyTeams[player.Team.Name] ~= nil;
end;

return WhitelistedTeams

================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/ConvertSpeed.lua ---

--[[
    ConvertSpeed (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local METERS_IN_A_STUD = 0.28;
local METERS_TO_KILOMETERS = 1000;
local SECONDS_IN_AN_HOUR = 3600;

return function(speed: number, toKPH: boolean, toKnots: boolean)
    if toKPH then
        return ((speed * METERS_IN_A_STUD) / METERS_TO_KILOMETERS) * SECONDS_IN_AN_HOUR / (if toKnots then 1.852 else 1);
    end;

    return ((speed / METERS_IN_A_STUD) * METERS_TO_KILOMETERS) / SECONDS_IN_AN_HOUR * (if toKnots then 1.852 else 1);
end;



================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/CooldownService.lua ---

--[[
    CooldownService (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
--[[


	CooldownService.lua
	oSudden
	12/1/2021

]]

local CooldownService = {}
local Cooldowns = {}

if _G.PCL ~= true then
	_G.PCL = true
	game.Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
		CooldownService:Unload(player)
	end)
end

function CooldownService:Create(Name : string)
	if Cooldowns[Name] ~= nil then return Cooldowns[Name] end
	Cooldowns[Name] = {}
	return Cooldowns[Name]
end

function CooldownService:Check(Name : string, Player : Player)
	if typeof(Name) ~= 'string' then warn('CooldownService:Check(name, plr) - Name is not a string.') return false end;
	if Cooldowns[Name] == nil then return false end
	if Cooldowns[Name][Player] == nil then return false end
	if Cooldowns[Name][Player] == false then return false end
	if Cooldowns[Name][Player] == true then return true end
	return false
end

function CooldownService:Add(Name : string, Player : Player, Time : number)
	if typeof(Name) ~= 'string' then warn('CooldownService:Add(name, plr, time) - Name is not a string.') return end;
	if Cooldowns[Name] == nil then return end
	if Cooldowns[Name][Player] == true then return end
	Cooldowns[Name][Player] = true
	task.spawn(function()
		task.wait(Time)
		Cooldowns[Name][Player] = false
	end)
end

function CooldownService:Remove(Name : string, Player : Player)
	if Cooldowns[Name] == nil then return end
	Cooldowns[Name][Player] = nil
end

function CooldownService:Unload(Player : Player)
	for _,Name in pairs(Cooldowns) do
		if type(Name) == "table" then
			Name[Player] = nil
		end
	end
end

return CooldownService


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/Date.lua ---

--[[
    Date (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
-- Date
-- Stephen Leitnick
-- September 12, 2017

--[=[

	Represents a date at a specific time. On the server, this will
	return UTC time. On the client, this will return local time.
	Note that the server-side in Play-Solo testing will also return
	local time.

	You can optionally force UTC within the Date.new constructor.


	REQUIRE:

		local Date = require(thisModule)

	
	CONSTRUCTORS:

		local date = Date.new([seconds [, useUtc]])
		local date = Date.fromJSON(jsonString)


	METHODS:

		date:ToJSON()
		date:ToSeconds()
		date:GetTimezoneHourOffset()
		date:Format(strFormat)
		date:ToUTC()
		date:ToLocal()
		date:ToISOString()
		date:ToDateString()
		date:ToTimeString()
		date:ToString()


	PROPERTIES:

		date.Hour
		date.Minute
		date.Weekday
		date.Day
		date.Month
		date.Year
		date.Second
		date.Millisecond
		date.Yearday
		date.IsDST


	NOTE ON SAVING:

		You should use 'date:ToSeconds()' for saving. It can
		represent the date in the smallest format. While using
		'date:ToJSON()' will work too, it has a higher data
		footprint. Example:

		SAVE:

			local date = Date.new()
			dataStore:SetAsync("myDate", date:ToSeconds())

		LOAD:

			local myDateSeconds = dataStore:GetAsync("myDate")
			local date = Date.new(myDateSeconds)

	

--]=]



local Date = {}
Date.__index = Date


local useUTC = game:GetService("RunService"):IsServer()


local WEEKDAYS = {"Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"}
local WEEKDAYS_SHORT = {"Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat"}

local MONTHS = {"January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June", "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"}
local MONTHS_SHORT = {"Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"}


-- Single-level table copy:
local function CopyTable(t)
	local tCopy = {}
	for k,v in pairs(t) do
		tCopy[k] = v
	end
	return tCopy
end


function Date.new(seconds, useUtcOverride)

	if (seconds ~= nil) then
		assert(type(seconds) == "number", "'seconds' argument #1 must be a number")
	else
		seconds = os.time()
	end

	local utc = useUTC
	if (useUtcOverride ~= nil) then
		utc = useUtcOverride
	end

	local d = os.date(utc and "!*t" or "*t", seconds)

	local self = setmetatable({
		Hour = d.hour;
		Minute = d.min;
		Weekday = d.wday;
		Day = d.day;
		Month = d.month;
		Year = d.year;
		Second = d.sec;
		Millisecond = math.floor((seconds % 1) * 1000);
		Yearday = d.yday;
		IsDST = d.isdst;
		_d = d;
		_s = seconds;
	}, Date)

	return self

end


function Date.fromJSON(jsonStr)
	assert(type(jsonStr) == "string", "'jsonStr' argument #1 must be a string")
	local success, data = pcall(function()
		return game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(jsonStr)
	end)
	if (not success) then
		error("Failed to decode JSON string: " .. tostring(data))
	end
	local seconds
	if (data._s) then
		seconds = data._s
	else
		seconds = os.time(data)
	end
	return Date.new(seconds)
end


function Date:ToJSON()
	local data = CopyTable(self._d)
	data._s = self._s
end


function Date:ToSeconds()
	return self._s
end


function Date:GetTimezoneHourOffset()
	local dUTC = os.date("!*t", self._s)
	return (self._d.hour - dUTC.hour)
end


function Date:ToISOString()
	local utc = self:ToUTC()
	local d = utc._d
	return ("%.2i-%.2i-%.2iT%.2i:%.2i:%.2i.%.3i"):format(
		d.year,
		d.month,
		d.day,
		d.hour,
		d.min,
		d.sec,
		math.floor((utc._s % 1) * 1000)
	)
end


function Date:ToDateString()
	local d = self._d
	return ("%s %s %i %i"):format(
		WEEKDAYS_SHORT[d.wday],
		MONTHS_SHORT[d.month],
		d.day,
		d.year
	)
end


function Date:ToTimeString()
	local d = self._d
	return ("%.2i:%.2i:%.2i"):format(
		d.hour,
		d.min,
		d.sec
	)
end


function Date:ToString()
	return (self:ToDateString() .. " " .. self:ToTimeString())
end


function Date:ToUTC()
	return Date.new(self._s, true)
end


function Date:ToLocal()
	return Date.new(self._s, false)
end


-- See GNU date commands:
-- https://www.cyberciti.biz/faq/linux-unix-formatting-dates-for-display/
function Date:Format(str)
	local d = self._d
	local h12 = d.hour
	if (h12 > 12) then
		h12 = h12 - 12
	end
	if (h12 == 0) then
		h12 = 0
	end
	str = str
		:gsub("%%a", WEEKDAYS_SHORT[d.wday])
		:gsub("%%A", WEEKDAYS[d.wday])
		:gsub("%%b", MONTHS_SHORT[d.month])
		:gsub("%%B", MONTHS[d.month])
		:gsub("%%c", self:ToString())
		:gsub("%%C", ((d.year - (d.year % 1000)) / 100) + 1)
		:gsub("%%d", ("%.2i"):format(d.day))
		:gsub("%%D", ("%.2i/%.2i/%s"):format(d.month, d.day, tostring(d.year):sub(-2)))
		:gsub("%%F", ("%i-%.2i-%.2i"):format(d.year, d.month, d.day))
		:gsub("%%H", ("%.2i"):format(d.hour))
		:gsub("%%k", ("%.2i"):format(d.hour))
		:gsub("%%I", ("%.2i"):format(h12))
		:gsub("%%l", ("%.2i"):format(h12))
		:gsub("%%j", ("%.3i"):format(d.yday))
		:gsub("%%m", ("%.2i"):format(d.month))
		:gsub("%%M", ("%.2i"):format(d.min))
		:gsub("%%n", "\n")
		:gsub("%%p", (d.hour >= 12 and "PM" or "AM"))
		:gsub("%%P", (d.hour >= 12 and "pm" or "am"))
		:gsub("%%r", ("%.2i:%.2i:%.2i %s"):format(h12, d.min, d.sec, (d.hour >= 12 and "PM" or "AM")))
		:gsub("%%R", ("%.2i:%.2i"):format(d.hour, d.min))
		:gsub("%%s", math.floor(self._s))
		:gsub("%%S", ("%.2i"):format(d.sec))
		:gsub("%%t", "\t")
		:gsub("%%T", ("%.2i:%.2i:%.2i"):format(d.hour, d.min, d.sec))
		:gsub("%%w", ("%.2i"):format(d.wday))
		:gsub("%%y", tostring(d.year):sub(-2))
		:gsub("%%Y", tostring(d.year))
	return str

end


Date.New = Date.new
Date.FromJSON = Date.fromJSON
Date.__tostring = Date.ToString
Date.__metatable = "locked"


function Date.__lt(d1, d2)
	return (d1._s < d2._s)
end


function Date.__le(d1, d2)
	return (d1._s <= d2._s)
end


function Date.__eq(d1, d2)
	return (d1._s == d2._s)
end


function Date.__unm(d)
	return Date.new(-d._s)
end


return Date


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/DebrisGobbler.lua ---

--[[
    DebrisGobbler (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
-- DebrisGobbler
-- by verret001

--[=[
	@class DebrisGobbler

	This module is a drop-in substitute for DebrisService that offers several significant performance and usability improvements.

	DebrisGobbler is much faster than DebrisService. While the DebrisService iterates through every item during each frame, resulting in up to 1000 iterations per frame or 60,000 iterations per second, this module only checks the nearest item to destruction per frame. 

	DebrisService has more problems that stem from this poor performance such as a preset limit on the number of debris items it can handle (which is 1000 by default), this causes problems such as Debris being destroyed before their expiry time. It also uses the old Roblox scheduler, which means 

	Despite these performance improvements, this module retains all of the advantages of DebrisService, such as not creating a new thread or coroutine for each new item and not holding onto destroyed items.

	To achieve this, the module utilizes a min-heap and some clever strategies to optimize the clearing of debris. The module is also strongly typed and offers some additional features on top of the original DebrisSevice such as DebrisGobbler:RemoveItem(Item).
]=]

local DebrisGobbler: DebrisGobbler = {}
local ExpiryReferences: ExpiryReferences = {}
local InstanceReferences: InstanceReferences = {}

local BinaryHeap = require(script.BinaryHeap)

local DebrisHeap = BinaryHeap.new(function(a, b)
	return (a < b)
end)

local pairs, clock, ceil, setmetatable = pairs, os.clock, math.ceil, setmetatable

game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
	local Node: Node | nil, Value: number = DebrisHeap:peek()
	local currentTime: number = clock() + 1 / 60
	if Node and Value < currentTime then
		ExpiryReferences[Node] = nil
		DebrisHeap:pop()
		for Item: Instance, _ in pairs(Node) do
			-- mmm trash, I love trash
			Item:Destroy()
		end
	end
end)

--[=[
    Adds an item to be destroyed in a specific amount of time.

    @param Item Instance -- The instance to destroy
    @param Time number -- The delta time to destruction Default: 7
    @return number -- Returns the CPU time of destruction
]=]
function DebrisGobbler:AddItem(Item: Instance, Time: number?)
	assert(typeof(Item) == "Instance", "Invalid argument #1, expected type Instance")
	assert(typeof(Time) == "number" or Time == nil, "Invalid argument #2, expected type number?")

	-- We're locked to 60fps, so we can save on # of nodes by rounding to the next nearest frame.
	local ExpiryTime: number = ceil((clock() + (Time or 7)) * 60) / 60

	local Node: Node = ExpiryReferences[ExpiryTime]

	if Node == nil then
		Node = {}
		ExpiryReferences[ExpiryTime] = Node
		DebrisHeap:insert(ExpiryTime, Node)
	end

	InstanceReferences[Item] = Node
	Node[Item] = Item.Destroying:Connect(function()
		Node[Item] = nil
		InstanceReferences[Item] = nil
	end)

	return ExpiryTime
end

--[=[
    Removes an item from any destruction queues.

    @param Item Instance -- The instance to remove from the destruction queue
    @return boolean -- Returns if the item was removed from the queue
]=]
function DebrisGobbler:RemoveItem(Item: Instance)
	assert(typeof(Item) == "Instance", "Invalid argument #1, expected type Instance")
	local Node: Node = InstanceReferences[Item]
	if Node then
		Node[Item]:Disconnect()
		Node[Item] = nil
		InstanceReferences[Item] = nil
	end

	return not not Node
end

type Node = { [Instance]: RBXScriptConnection }
type ExpiryReferences = { [number]: Node }
type InstanceReferences = { [Instance]: Node }
type DebrisGobbler = typeof(DebrisGobbler)

return DebrisGobbler :: DebrisGobbler


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/DebrisGobbler_contents/BinaryHeap.lua ---

--[[
    BinaryHeap (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared → DebrisGobbler
    Parent: DebrisGobbler
    ⚠️  NESTED SCRIPT: This script is inside another script
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local BinaryHeap = {}
BinaryHeap.__index = BinaryHeap

function BinaryHeap.new(lt)
	local self = setmetatable({
		values = {},
		lt = lt,
		nodes = {},
		reverse = {}
	}, BinaryHeap)
	
	return self
end

function BinaryHeap:erase(pos)
	local node = self.nodes[pos]
	self.reverse[node] = nil
	self.nodes[pos] = nil
	self.values[pos] = nil
end

function BinaryHeap:swap(a, b)
	local pla, plb = self.nodes[a], self.nodes[b]
	self.reverse[pla], self.reverse[plb] = b, a
	self.nodes[a], self.nodes[b] = plb, pla

	self.values[a], self.values[b] = self.values[b], self.values[a] -- swap(heap, a, b)
end

local floor = math.floor
function BinaryHeap:bubbleUp(pos)
	local values = self.values
	while pos > 1 do
		local parent = floor(pos / 2)
		if not self.lt(values[pos], values[parent]) then
			break
		end
		self:swap(parent, pos)
		pos = parent
	end
end

function BinaryHeap:sinkDown(pos)
	local values = self.values
	local last = #values
	while true do
		local min = pos
		local child = 2 * pos

		for c = child, child + 1 do
			if c <= last and self.lt(values[c], values[min]) then
				min = c
			end
		end

		if min == pos then
			break
		end

		self:swap(pos, min)
		pos = min
	end
end

function BinaryHeap:peek()
	return self.nodes[1], self.values[1]
end

function BinaryHeap:peekValue()
	return self.values[1]
end

function BinaryHeap:valueBynode(node)
	return self.values[self.reverse[node]]
end

function BinaryHeap:remove(pos)
	local last = #self.values
	if pos < 1 then
		return
	end
	if pos < last then
		local v = self.values[pos]
		self:swap(pos, last)
		self:erase(last)
		self:bubbleUp(pos)
		self:sinkDown(pos)
		return v
	end
	if pos == last then
		local v = self.values[pos]
		self:erase(last)
		return v
	end
end

function BinaryHeap:pop()
	if self.values[1] then
		local node = self.nodes[1]
		local value = self:remove(1)
		return node, value
	end
end

function BinaryHeap:size()
	return #self.values
end

function BinaryHeap:removeNode(node)
	local pos = self.reverse[node]
	if pos ~= nil then
		return self:remove(pos), node
	end
end

function BinaryHeap:insert(value, node)
	assert(self.reverse[node] == nil, "node already exists")
	assert(value ~= nil, "inserted value is nil")
	
	local pos = #self.values + 1
	self.reverse[node] = pos
	self.nodes[pos] = node
	
	self.values[pos] = value
	self:bubbleUp(pos)
end

function BinaryHeap:update(node, newValue)
	local pos = self.reverse[node]
	assert(pos >= 1 and pos <= #self.values, "position is invalid")
	assert(newValue ~= nil, "inserted value is nil")
	self.values[pos] = newValue
	if pos > 1 then
		self:bubbleUp(pos)
	end
	if pos < #self.values then
		self:sinkDown(pos)
	end
end

return BinaryHeap

--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/DeveloperCheck.lua ---

--[[
    DeveloperCheck (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
-- Developer Check
-- Khizzer
-- January 19, 2022

local devs = {
    71812450, -- canuck
    25198607, -- redq
    851781641, -- pizzar alt (iilt_major)
    48509356, -- auto alt (automationere)
    150076872, -- pizzar
    8763017, -- 3rdkingben
    743519565, -- axergious
    271924097, -- rangeet
    47890485, -- auto
    2311317483, -- NocturnallyRikona
    365037596, -- milex
    49444425, -- shelly
}

return function(plr)
    if plr.UserId == 47890485 or plr.UserId == 25198607 then
        return true
    end
    if plr:GetAttribute('Developer') ~= nil then
        return plr:GetAttribute('Developer');
    end;

    if not table.find(devs, plr.UserId) then
        plr:SetAttribute('Developer', false)
        return false
    end

    if plr:GetRankInGroup(5530527) >= 241  then
        plr:SetAttribute('Developer', true)
        return true
    end
    plr:SetAttribute('Developer', false)
    return false
end;

--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/Functions.lua ---

--[[
    Functions (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
-- Functions
-- Khizzer
-- August 6, 2021



local Functions = {}

function Functions:Create(obj)
	obj = Instance.new(obj)
	return function (props)
		for prop, val in next, props do
			obj[prop] = val
		end
		return obj
	end
end

return Functions

--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/GetPlayerFromCharacter.lua ---

--[[
    GetPlayerFromCharacter (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local players = game:GetService('Players');
local GetPlayers = players.GetPlayers;

return function(char)
	for i, v in next, GetPlayers(players) do
		if v.Character == char then
			return v;
		end;
	end;
end;

--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/GetPlayerFromName.lua ---

--[[
    GetPlayerFromName (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
-- Get Player From Name
-- Khizzer
-- December 23, 2023


return function(name: string): Player?
    if typeof(name) == 'Instance' then return name end

    for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if player.Name:lower() == name:lower() then
            return player
        end
    end
    return
end


================================================================================
--- SCRIPT PATH: ReplicatedStorage/Aero/Shared/GetPlayersWithinRadius.lua ---

--[[
    GetPlayersWithinRadius (ModuleScript)
    Path: ReplicatedStorage → Aero → Shared
    Parent: Shared
    Exported: 2026-04-17 17:07:34
]]
return function(position: Vector3, radius: number)
    local players = {};
    for _, player in ipairs(game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()) do
        if player.Character and player.Character.PrimaryPart and (player.Character.PrimaryPart.Position-position).Magnitude <= radius then
            players[#players+1] = player;
        end;
    end;
    return players;
end;
